name: New Firewall Rule Added In Windows Firewall Exception List Via WmiPrvSE.EXE
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: New Firewall Rule Added In Windows Firewall Exception List Via WmiPrvSE.EXE
SIGMA Description: Detects the addition of a new "Allow" firewall rule by the WMI process (WmiPrvSE.EXE).
This can occur if an attacker leverages PowerShell cmdlets such as "New-NetFirewallRule", or directly uses WMI CIM classes such as "MSFT_NetFirewallRule".


False positives:
- Administrator scripts or activity.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('2004', '2071', '2097')) AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%action%3%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\system32\wbem\wmiprvse.exe%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY New Firewall Rule Added In Windows Firewall Exception List Via WmiPrvSE.EXE on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('2004', '2071', '2097')) AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%action%3%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%:\windows\system32\wbem\wmiprvse.exe%' AQL filter query
